name: Map of the Undersong
description: Not a chart so much as a tuning fork bound in vellum: the passages beneath the Unsung are marked here as notches filed into the map's iron spine, each one ringing a different pitch when struck, so that the route to the source is read not by the eye but by the ear and the hand, a scale descending from the Descent to the root of the world. It is colder than the deepest ice and it never stops faintly humming, a single low tone felt in the fingers that holds true no matter how the map is turned — the note of the underhum itself, carried up out of the dark for anyone with the nerve to follow it down.
